ab: kikay ta’isasadrane va’iyane ka, kake si kaka ’abayane ka amwa Taito swapepeale tatavane.
ch: 這個假日，我和姊姊去台東拜訪叔叔。
en: This holiday, my sister and I went to Taitung to visit my uncle.

ch: 我們從台北搭火車去臺東。
en: We took the train from Taipei to Taitung.

ab: mwaninga Taito, ’angosengepae ’awkay tisyaba dresenge namiya ki tatava.
ch: 到了台東，叔叔開車來車站接我們。
en: When we arrived in Taitung, my uncle drove to the station to pick us up.

ab: tisyaba ka ika’adavili da’anini ki tatava ki ’Ase, ’angesangepaemade ka wadodao’o kimade mwa.
ch: 車站離’Ase叔叔家沒有很遠，開車一下子就到了。
en: The station is not far from my uncle's house, and it's just a short drive away.

ab: tatava ’Ase da’anini ka wadali tathadethade’ane, ’angeese kiname ’angotawngatingi mwa tathadethade’ane.
ch: ’Ase叔叔家附近有個很大的牧場，我們一起騎腳踏車到牧場。
en: There is a big ranch near my uncle's house, and we rode bicycles to the ranch together.

ab: ’ikay tathadethade’ane, tatava ’Ase wameamece namiya pakane na saw’iyo si ’ango’ema.
ch: 在牧場，’Ase叔叔帶我們餵羊和騎馬。
en: In the ranch, my uncle took us to feed the sheep and ride horses.

ab: ma’awbonga ka, la ’angese kiname mwa tokosi kwane na do’o.
ch: 晚上，我們一起去市區吃飯。
en: In the evening, we went to the city to have dinner together.

ab: tokosi ka madraw na sangepae, nikwaname i’ango’otobay mwa drayne.
ch: 市區車子很多，所以我們騎摩托車去那裡。
en: There are a lot of cars in the city, so we go there by motorcycle.

ab: ta’avagay myaname ka, laso igo’o kiname kya’opa na coaw ’otobay swaongaynga kiname ’angobase ’avagay.
ch: 要離開的時候，發現摩托車被偷了，我們只好搭公車離開。
en: When we were about to leave, we found that the motorcycle had been stolen, so we had to leave by bus.

ab: nakay ka ’abeenga kiname mwa Taihoko, amiyani ko ’otobayni ki tatava ’Ase ka mwakononga nyani.
ch: 現在我們回到台北了，不知道’Ase叔叔的摩托車找到了沒有。
en: Now that we are back in Taipei, I don't know if my uncle's motorcycle has been found.
